title: Custom Event Emitter
description: Implement a Node.js-style EventEmitter with support for on, once, off, and emit methods, plus wildcard listeners.

complexity.time: O(n) for emit where n = listeners

requirements: Implement once(event, listener) for one-time listeners
Support wildcard '*' listener that receives all events
Return this from on/once/off for chaining

few_shot_examples.prompt: Remove a specific listener from an array.
